calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Dec-13-2004 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Dec-13-2004 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on as re-assigned by the Master Calendar Dept. 206 for Prove-Up Hearing/Court Trial this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Tony Vaughn.
Michael Rossoff, Esq. for Plaintiff: Community Housing Partnership, a California nonprofit corporation.
No appearance by the Defendant: Albert A. Kafenberger.
Plaintiff's witness: Harold Dees, was sworn and direct examined.
Exh. 1 - Threeday Notice dtd. 9-14-04---------ID/EVID.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendants: Lajuana Tucker and Geginald Starks as follows:
Restitution and possession of the premises located at 1000 Market St., #302, San Francisco.
Rent and Per Diem Damages of $3,200.89
No Attorney's Fees and waived costs.
Counsel stipulated for the return of the Exhibit in open court.
Judgment signed in open court.
